80:
(-Ga Bu-)Th-The...
The patriarch, he...he's...
<gulp> <Emphasis>...The patriarch is going to summon the Great Father again, and you have to stop him</Emphasis>! Beat him, fight him, <Emphasis>stop him</Emphasis>!
